one_time_description: Forgiveness of government loans payable (ISC and BC Treaty Commission Land Claims Program loans)
economic_notes: Musqueam has extensive real estate development activities through MST Development Corporation partnerships (Jericho, Fairmont, West Vancouver, Jericho 2016 lands), Block F development, Willingdon Developments, LDB Developments, Musqueam Marina, and Salish Seas Fisheries. GBE total assets of $488.6M including investment properties of $376.9M. MST Employment & Training Society established during the year. 2010 Legacies Trust ($17M Olympic legacy fund) maintained.
notes: Fiscal year 2020 (ended March 31, 2020). Complex consolidation including 28+ OGO subsidiaries and 30+ GBEs/GBPs accounted for by modified equity method. One-time item: $2.23M forgiveness of Land Claims Program loans from ISC and BC Treaty Commission. GBE real estate business has $169M long-term debt and $133M other liabilities at the GBE level (not consolidated on Band balance sheet). Block F lands transferred to GBE in 2017 at $113.4M fair value. MST partnerships involve joint ownership with Squamish Nation and Tsleil-Waututh Nation. Net financial assets of $201.8M reflects strong balance sheet. TCA net book value of $82.1M includes $51.6M OGO lands (not amortized). ISC funding calculated as gross ISC $5,413,238 less ISC deferred revenue transfer -$197,314 = $5,215,924. Total government transfers per statement = $15,159,183. OSR = total revenue $32,907,384 less government transfers $15,159,183 = $17,748,201. Annual debt service reflects only CMHC loan repayments; capital lease payments of $32,171 also made. Housing units based on 151 Housing Equalization Program participants. Audit signed November 3, 2020.
